summary: shelf.py gains `probe [IDs|--all] [--timeout]`: fetches entry URLs, writes last_status/last_checked into catalog.jsonl (atomic rewrite), prints report; list/stats surface the results. Tested compile + probe on all 7 entries.
environment_note: Sandbox egress allowlist permits github.com only; 5/7 probes recorded proxy 403 tunnel errors that reflect the runner environment, not artifact death. met-openaccess and smithsonian-openaccess verified live (HTTP 200).
next: Run 4: exploration is allowed again — either research a new artifact category (small public tools / games / simulations, still untouched) and shelve finds, or probe deeper into the CC0 GLAM direction by sketching what a long-tail explorer over Met/Smithsonian flat files would query.
